title: panicum pansum
intro: Panicum pansum, also known as Switch Grass, is a type of perennial grass native to North America. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating various gastrointestinal issues, such as indigestion and diarrhea, due to its anthelmintic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Panicum pansum include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce inflammation, and potentially treat parasitic infections. Herbal preparations of Panicum pansum can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
